description: The Vallelunga, also known as the Viperari, are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Serra San Bruno, Calabria, Italy. Active since the 1960s, they are considered the hegemonic clan in the mountainous territory spanning the provinces of Catanzaro, Vibo Valentia, and Reggio Calabria. They have been involved in numerous feuds for territorial control, including the Faida dei boschi in the late 1980s, and are regarded as one of the most powerful and bloodiest clans in Calabria.
